data.romaji: mondai tsugi no bunshou wo yonde ,
data.translation: Question Read the following passage,

data.romaji: shitsumon ni kotae nasai .
data.translation: Answer the questions.

data.romaji: kotae ha ,
data.translation: The answer is

data.romaji: 1 ・ 2 ・ 3 ・ 4 kara mottomo yoi mono wo ichi tsu erabi nasai .
data.translation: Choose the best one from 1, 2, 3, and 4.

meaning: indicates the subject of a sentence

data.romaji: go chuumon no shouhin ga kowarete ita baai ,
data.translation: If the product you ordered is damaged,

meaning: indicates the subject of a sentence

data.romaji: aruiha go chuumon to ha kotonaru shouhin ga todoita baai ha ,
data.translation: Or if you receive a product different from what you ordered,

data.romaji: shouhin touchaku nochi 10 nichi inai ni tousha ( ※ 1 ) he go henpin ( ※ 2 ) kudasai .
data.translation: Please return the product (*2) to us (*1) within 10 days after receiving the product.

meaning: indicates the subject of a sentence

data.romaji: souryou ha tousha ga futan ( ※ 3 ) itashimasu .
data.translation: We will pay the shipping fee (*3).

data.romaji: o kyaku sama no go kibou ni yoru henpin no baai mo ,
data.translation: In the case of returns due to the customer's request,

data.romaji: douyou ni shouhin touchaku nochi 10 nichi inai ni go henpin kudasai .
data.translation: Similarly, please return the product within 10 days after receiving the product.

data.romaji: kono baai ,
data.translation: in this case,

data.romaji: ato de daikin ha o kaeshi itashimasuga ,
data.translation: I will refund the money later, but

data.romaji: souryou ha o kyaku sama no go futan to narimasu .
data.translation: Shipping costs will be borne by the customer.

data.romaji: shouhin touchaku nochi 10 nichi wo sugita baai ha ,
data.translation: If it has been more than 10 days since the product arrived,

data.romaji: henpin wo uke suru koto ha dekimasen .
data.translation: We cannot accept returns.

data.romaji: ( ※ 1 ) tousha : watashi tachi no kaisha
data.translation: (*1) Our company: Our company

data.romaji: ( ※ 2 ) henpin : shouhin wo kau no wo yamete ,
data.translation: (*2) Return: Stop buying the product,

data.romaji: kaesu koto
data.translation: to give back

data.romaji: ( ※ 3 ) futan : hikiukete ,
data.translation: (*3) Burden: Undertake,

data.romaji: jibun no hiyou ya shigoto to suru koto
data.translation: to do at one's own expense or work

data.romajiQues: kono naiyou ni tsuite , tadashii no ha dore ka .
data.translationQues: Which of the following is correct regarding this content?
romajiOption: kyaku ga kibou shite henpin suru baai , shouhin touchaku nochi 10 nichi inai de areba , souryou ha harawanakute mo ii .
todoita shouhin ga kowarete ita baai , shouhin touchaku nochi 10 nichi inai no henpin de areba , souryou ha muryou .
shouhin ga ki ni iranakatta to iu riyuu de henpin suru koto ha dekinai .
todoita shouhin ga chuumon shita mono to kotonatte ita baai de mo , henpin no souryou ha kyaku ga harau .
translationOption: If a customer wishes to return an item within 10 days of receiving the item, there is no need to pay shipping charges.
If the item you receive is damaged, shipping is free if you return it within 10 days of receiving the item.
You cannot return a product just because you don't like it.
Even if the delivered product is different from the one ordered, the customer pays the return shipping costs.
